explanations.10: Healthcheck tells Docker to periodically test if the MySQL database is still running and healthy.
explanations.12: This command runs mysqladmin ping to check if MySQL is responding; Docker executes it inside the container.
explanations.14: Timeout is how long Docker waits for the ping command to complete before deciding it failed.
explanations.16: Retries is how many times Docker will try the healthcheck before marking the database as unhealthy.
